sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14457" key="a)prosau/dhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπροσ-αύδητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not accosted,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.29b</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">921f</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unapproachable,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristocl.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:11:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
